nodes.name: 雨燕目
nodes.summary: 雨燕目（Apodiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联177种鸟类，如Starry owlet-nightjar、Wallace's owlet-nightjar、Mountain owlet-nightjar等177种鸟类。

nodes.name: 农药污染
nodes.summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。

nodes.name: Chimney swift
nodes.summary: Chimney swift（Chimney swift，学名 Chaetura pelagica），分类上属于雨燕目，并归入雨燕科，在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要威胁包括农药污染。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 雨燕科
nodes.summary: 雨燕科（Apodidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联78种鸟类，如Chestnut-collared swift、Tepui swift、White-collared swift等78种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Although the global population is estimated at , it has declined precipitously across the majority of its range. The causes of population declines are largely unclear, but may be related to the alteration of the insect community due to pesticide use in the early half of the 20th century. In Canada, they were listed as threatened by COSEWIC for several years with a likely future listing as a Schedule 1 species of the Species at Risk Act

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Chimney swift 属于目 雨燕目。

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Chimney swift 属于科 雨燕科。

links.label: 属于目
links.evidence: 依据 birds.csv 中的 order / order_cn 与 family / family_cn 字段补充。
